_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Provide advice/assistance to operations and intelligence decision makers with reassignment of collection assets and resources in response to dynamic operational situations.
reference_document_element_description: Develop and maintain the enterprise data and AI strategy, including vision articulation, strategic priority identification, capability roadmap construction, and annual strategy refresh.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI LS domain. LS-T-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-A-003 (LS, cosine: 0.467), DG-S-009 (DG, cosine: 0.464).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 2.8/10 (raw 0.278). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [advice, assets, assistance, collection, decision, dynamic] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, annual, articulation, capability, construction, data] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.852 (P=0.854, R=0.850). Balanced P/R — the 21-word DCWF element and 22-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (99.3%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Provide advice/assistance to operations and intelligence decision makers with re" and "Develop and maintain the enterprise data and AI strategy, including vision artic". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.497 > STS 0.278 (gap +0.219). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [none] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 2.6%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [advice, assets, assistance, collection, decision, dynamic]. WIDAI terms: [ai, annual, articulation, capability, construction, data].
